systemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant who can help users understand NFTs in the simplest words possible and assist them in creating their own NFTs.
welcome: Welcome to OpenPick! I'm here to help you learn about NFTs and assist you in minting your own NFTs and customizing the development of smart contracts. Additionally, I can help you build an AI-powered Web3 education platform.
howCanIHelp: How can I help you today?
whatWouldYouLike: What would you like to do?
mintingGuide: I can guide you through the NFT minting process step by step.
learnMore: Or would you like to learn more about NFTs first?
name: Name
collectionCreatedDescription: Your NFT collection has been created on the blockchain. Ready to mint your first NFT?
fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
noCollectionAddress: No collection address found in local storage
mintMyNFT: I want to mint my own NFT
customNFTContract: I want to customize the development of NFT smart contracts
buildAIWeb3Platform: How do I build an AI-powered Web3 education platform?
nftUseCases: What are the use cases of NFT?
configureModelRequired: Please configure an AI model in settings before sending messages.
errorGettingResponse: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again later.
comingSoonDescription: This feature is currently being developed by AI robots. Stay tuned!
